fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Analysis Line Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the analysis report line that the specific chart is based on.

fields.name: Analysis Column Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the analysis report column that the advanced chart is based on.

fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the analysis report chart shows values for sales, purchase, or inventory.

fields.name: Analysis Line Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Analysis Column Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Original Measure Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the analysis report columns or lines that you select to insert in the Analysis Report Chart Setup window.

fields.name: Measure Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the analysis report columns or lines that the measures on the y-axis in the specific chart are based on.

fields.name: Measure Value
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Chart Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the analysis report values are represented graphically in the specific chart.
